narrationTemplate: There are {total} fish in the pond. {partA} are blue koi. How many are yellow tetras?
notes: Take-apart shows the whole and one part; the kid finds the other part. Uses two distinct species (blue koi, yellow tetras) for visual separation — matches the K decomposition-coloring-by-layer rule from k-activity-patterns.md (different species at Concrete layer). The highlight on the blue koi at 3s draws attention to the 'given' part before asking about the unknown.
